message:
feat(runtime): add async spawn_blocking utility (bd-13l3)

Adds spawn_blocking and spawn_blocking_io functions for running blocking
operations on a dedicated thread while yielding to the async runtime.

Phase 0 implementation spawns a thread per operation. In Phase 1+ this
should be routed through the BlockingPool. Includes:

- Soft cancellation support (operation continues, result discarded)
- Panic propagation from blocking thread to async context
- yield_now-based polling for cooperative multitasking
- Tests for basic operations, closures, parallel execution, and panics

Part of bd-13l3: Async filesystem I/O (reactor + blocking pool).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
